subject: fix(debug): safe stringify, stable React keys, capture real stack traces
body:
Three issues found during fresh-eyes full branch audit:

1. debugLog.js: JSON.stringify(e.details) in debugGenerateReport could
   throw on circular references, crashing report generation entirely.
   Added safeStringify wrapper with try/catch → '[unserializable]'
   fallback. Report generation must never crash.

2. DebugPill.jsx: PWA diagnostics results list used array index as React
   key. Results are cleared and rebuilt on each re-run — index keys cause
   incorrect DOM reuse if result order ever changes. Replaced with
   r.label which is unique and stable per diagnostic check.

3. index.html: Pre-React error handler passed filename:lineno as the
   'stack' parameter to __debugPushError. The ErrorEvent has e.error.stack
   with the full stack trace — now captured when available, with
   filename:lineno as fallback for cross-origin script errors where
   e.error is null.

Tags: debug, bugfix, robustness
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
